---
title: "Tip-Enhanced Raman Images of Realistic Systems through Ab Initio Modeling"
author: ["Krystof Brezina", "Yair Litman", "Mariana Rossi"]
date: 2026-02-18
publication: "ACS Nano **20**, 5550–5560 (2026)"
categories: ["spectroscopy", "TERS"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1021/acsnano.5c16052
url_preprint:
journ: "ACS Nano"
issue: 20
page: "5550-5560"
year: 2026
pub_number: 31
image: featured.webp
---
